title: Definitions
doc_html:
Art. 1544.  Definitions

 Except when the context clearly indicates otherwise, as used in this Chapter, "officiant" is a person authorized by law to perform marriage ceremonies.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §15, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
